---
title: "Pew Assignment"
author: "Sam Eckhardt and Joey Miranda"
date: "Sunday, November 16, 2014"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(rCharts)
library(reshape2)
library(scales)
load("~/SCHOOL/Senior Fall/MKTG 489/pewglobal/mydata.Rda")
```

```{r}
SelectData<-mydata%>%
  select(4,6:11,100:760)%>%
  select(1:7,86,87,100:660)%>%
  select(1:9,200:569)%>%
  select(1:9,31,32,100:378)%>%
  select(1,3:11,96,97)


p1<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q1", sort = "count(Q1)"),y="count(Q1)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p1$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p1$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p1$addParams(title = "Satisfied with Country?")
p1


p2<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q4", sort = "count(Q4)"),y="count(Q4)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p2$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p2$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p2$addParams(title = "Describe Current Economic Condition")
p2


p3<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q5", sort = "count(Q5)"),y="count(Q5)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p3$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p3$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p3$addParams(title = "Expectation of Economy in 1 Year")
p3


p4<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q6", sort = "count(Q6)"),y="count(Q6)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p4$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p4$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p4$addParams(title = "Personal Economic Condition")
p4


p5<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q7", sort = "count(Q7)"),y="count(Q7)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p5$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p5$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p5$addParams(title = "Personal Economic Improvement")
p5


p6<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q8", sort = "count(Q8)"),y="count(Q8)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p6$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p6$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p6$addParams(title = "Will Your Children be Better or Worse Off?")
p6


p7<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q47US", sort = "count(Q47US)"),y="count(Q47US)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p7$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p7$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p7$addParams(title = "US Thoughts on US Consideration of Other Nations")
p7


p8<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q164", sort = "count(Q164)"),y="count(Q164)",data=SelectData,type="bar",color="Q164")
p8$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p8$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p8$addParams(title = "Gender")
p8


p9<-rPlot(x="bin(Q165,10)",y="count(bin(Q165,10))",data=SelectData, type="bar")
p9$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p9$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p9$addParams(title = "Age Group")
p9


p10<-rPlot(x=list(var = "PARTY", sort = "count(PARTY)"),y="count(PARTY)",data=SelectData,type="bar",color="PARTY")
p10$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p10$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p10$addParams(title = "Party Affiliation")
p10


p11<-rPlot(x=list(var = "PARTYLN", sort = "count(PARTYLN)"),y="count(PARTYLN)",data=SelectData,type="bar",color="PARTYLN")
p11$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p11$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p11$addParams(title = "Independant Party Lean")
p11

p12<-rPlot(x=list(var = "Q47", sort = "count(Q47)"),y="count(Q47)",data=SelectData,type="bar")
p12$guides(x = list(title = "Response"))
p12$guides(y = list(title = "Count"))
p12$addParams(title = "Other Nations thoughts on US Consideration of Other Nations")
p12

p1$print("chart1")
p2$print("chart2")
p3$print("chart3")
p4$print("chart4")
p5$print("chart5")
p6$print("chart6")
p7$print("chart7")
p8$print("chart8")
p9$print("chart9")
p10$print("chart10")
p11$print("chart11")
p12$print("chart12")

```
<iframe src="p1rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p2rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p3rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p4rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p5rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p6rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p7rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p8rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p9rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p10rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p11rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
<iframe src="p12rChart.html" width="800" height="600"></iframe>
